case_title: CLAUDIA G. CITROEN VS. JARROD C. CORNEHL

docket_entries.description: EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED SEP-24-2010, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CORNEHL, JARROD C.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-25-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITROEN, CLAUDIA G. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CORNEHL, JARROD C. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITROEN, CLAUDIA G. AS TO DEFENDANT CORNEHL, JARROD C.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-25-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-25-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,540.00 FILED BY CITROEN, CLAUDIA G. AS TO DEFENDANT CORNEHL, JARROD C. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-25-2010 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
